transcript.text:
I’ve finished the codebase trace. The shared Storybook environment needs to mirror: `StrictMode` plus `LikedArticlesProvider`, `src/index.css`, `heartAnimation.css` via the provider, `localStorage` seeds for `lang` and `likedArticles`, deterministic Wikipedia API responses for `useWikiArticles`, and a fixed date for the export flow. No real portal roots showed up, so I won’t invent `preview-body.html`; the overlays are plain fixed-position DOM in the component tree.

Next I’m making the global setup in one pass:
1. Add MSW plus `mockdate`, generate the service worker, and teach Storybook to serve `public`.
2. Rewrite `.storybook/preview.tsx` to own the provider tree, CSS import, seeded browser state, and global handlers.
3. Expand TypeScript includes so `.storybook/preview.tsx` is actually typechecked.
4. Then I’ll add story files one at a time and run `npx vitest --project storybook <story-file>` after each new file before moving on.

Storybook now uses a faithful default app environment in [preview.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/.storybook/preview.tsx#L1): it imports the real root CSS, wraps stories in `StrictMode` and `LikedArticlesProvider`, seeds `localStorage` for `lang` and `likedArticles`, fixes the date with `mockdate`, and loads global MSW handlers. I added the shared Wikipedia mocks in [msw-handlers.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/.storybook/msw-handlers.ts#L1) and reusable fixture data in [story-fixtures.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/.storybook/story-fixtures.ts#L1). Storybook now serves `public` via [main.ts](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/.storybook/main.ts#L1), and I generated [mockServiceWorker.js](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/public/mockServiceWorker.js) plus the matching deps/config in [package.json](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/package.json#L1). I did not add `preview-body.html` because the app doesn’t use `createPortal` or dedicated portal roots.

I added five colocated story files with 15 `play`-verified stories: [App.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/src/App.stories.tsx#L1), [WikiCard.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/src/components/WikiCard.stories.tsx#L1), [LanguageSelector.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector.stories.tsx#L1), [Article.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/src/components/Article.stories.tsx#L1), and [ArticleList.stories.tsx](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/src/components/ArticleList.stories.tsx#L1). I also expanded TS includes so the preview and Storybook support files are typechecked in [tsconfig.app.json](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/tsconfig.app.json#L1) and [tsconfig.node.json](/Users/kasperpeulen/code/storybook/storybook-eval/trials/2026-04-10T15-40-43Z-faa16934/project/frontend/tsconfig.node.json#L1).
